name: Navy Minced Beef (Sos)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook beef with onions in its own fat until the beef loses its pink color and is well-stirred to break apart. Drain or skim off excess fat.
2. Sprinkle flour over the beef mixture; continue cooking until the flour is absorbed.
3. Add tomatoes, mace or nutmeg, salt, and pepper. Stir well and simmer for 10 to 15 minutes.
4. Serve over Toast, biscuits, rice, or pasta.
